title: Precious Prismarine
body:
This pack gives prismarine a more valuable look by remaking its textures to look more like blocks that would come in ores such as gold. The prismarine shard has been changed to resemble the raw ores, while the prismarine block has been remade to be static, but shinier. Meanwhile, the prismarine bricks are shiner and also symmetrical, and prismarine crystals have also been included to look like a nugget.

That's all, enjoy!

_ARR license means do not reupload or redistribute this pack in any capacity. If you would like to use my assets for something you publish, get my permission! =]_
